heading: Transferred
label: 955a to 955d Transferred
notes: CodificationSections, , §§ 1–4, , , 1160, relating to maritime drug law enforcement, were transferred to sections 1901 to 1904 of the former Appendix to Title 46, Shipping. Sections 1901 to 1904 of the former Appendix to Title 46 were repealed and restated in chapter 705 of Title 46, Shipping, by , §§ 10(2), 19, , , 1710. For disposition of sections of the former Appendix to Title 46, see Disposition Table preceding .Pub. L. 96–35094 Stat. 1159Pub.
